byWSYX Staff



COLUMBUS, Ohio (WSYX) —As students get ready to head back to school, Groveport Police has a message for drivers.

The department is using a viral meme from the Olympics to warn central Ohioans that speeds drop 20 miles per hour in a school zone.



The post reads:

Also, don't forget that pedestrians in the crosswalk have the right-of-way.

2025Sinclair, Inc.
title: Police department uses viral Olympic meme to encourage safe driving
description: As students get ready to head back to school, Groveport Police has a message for drivers.
